The '''winged xendrite''' was an [[Diet/Legends|insectivore]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to [[Xend]]. It was exported to various [[Planet/Legends|planets]] throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in attempts to control [[Insect/Legends|insect]] infestations. 

==Biology and appearance==
The winged xendrite had small legs and a prehensile tail that they used to secure themselves to branches or structures. They would then use their sticky tongue to catch insects.<ref name= "CG" />

==Behavior==
It was initially believed that the xendrites hunted using a net or sieve approach where they would randomly stick out their tongue to catch anything in the way but it was later determined they were targeting the prey with a 98% accuracy rate.<ref name= "CG" />

==History==
Xendrites were often used as pest control on other worlds, but this often led to the problem of overpopulation. On [[Sirdar]], the creatures were introduced to eliminate insects but caused extreme environmental damage with their feces. They also developed into huge flocks that blocked out the sun. The [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of Sirdar hired [[Yosev Seville]] and her crew to rid his planet of the creatures for a fee of 25 million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name= "CG" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
